controls.control_objective: To ensure supersede the earlier directions on the subject, namely, 'master circular- 'classification and reporting' (dcbr
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall supersede the earlier directions on the subject,
namely, 'Master Circular- 'Classification and Reporting' (DCBR.CO.BPD.MC.No.1/
12.05.001/2015-16) dated July 1, 2015.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to supersede the earlier directions on the subject, namely, 'master circular- 'classification and reporting' (dcbr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (fraud risk management in ucbs / stcbs / ccbs) directions, 2024
controls.control_description:
1.1 Short Title and Commencement
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk
Management in UCBs / StCBs / CCBs) Directions, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (fraud risk management in ucbs / stcbs / ccbs) directions, 2024

controls.control_objective: To ensure hereinafter collectively be referred to as 'cooperative banks' for the purpose of these directions
controls.control_description:
Such
Cooperative Banks shall hereinafter collectively be referred to as 'Cooperative
Banks' for the purpose of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hereinafter collectively be referred to as 'cooperative banks' for the purpose of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a board2 approved policy3 on fraud risk management delineating roles and responsibilities of board / board committees and senior management of the
controls.control_description:
2.1 There shall be a Board2 Approved Policy3 on fraud risk management delineating
roles and responsibilities of Board / Board Committees and Senior Management of
the Cooperative Bank.The Policy shall also incorporate measures for ensuring
1 StCBs / CCBs shall report the incidents of fraud to NABARD as hitherto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a board2 approved policy3 on fraud risk management delineating roles and responsibilities of board / board committees and senior management of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter alia contain measures towards prevention, early detection, investigation, staff accountability, monitoring, recovery and reporting of frauds
controls.control_description: 2 Board of Directors of a Cooperative Bank 3 The policy shall inter alia contain measures towards prevention, early detection, investigation, staff accountability, monitoring, recovery and reporting of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter alia contain measures towards prevention, early detection, investigation, staff accountability, monitoring, recovery and reporting of frauds

controls.control_objective: To ensure include:
controls.control_description:
compliance with principles of natural justice4 in a time-bound manner which at a
minimum shall include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide complete details of transactions / actions / events basis which declaration and reporting of a fraud is being contemplated under these directi
controls.control_description:
The SCN shall provide complete
details of transactions / actions / events basis which declaration and reporting
of a fraud is being contemplated under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide complete details of transactions / actions / events basis which declaration and reporting of a fraud is being contemplated under these directi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the persons / entities on whom the scn was served to respond to the said scn
controls.control_description:
2.1.2 A reasonable time of not less than 21 days shall be provided to the
Persons / Entities on whom the SCN was served to respond to the said SCN.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the persons / entities on whom the scn was served to respond to the said scn

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a well laid out system for issuance of scn and examination of the responses / submissions made by the persons / entities prior to declaring such
controls.control_description:
2.1.3 Cooperative Banks shall have a well laid out system for issuance of
SCN and examination of the responses / submissions made by the Persons /
Entities prior to declaring such Persons / Entities as fraudulent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a well laid out system for issuance of scn and examination of the responses / submissions made by the persons / entities prior to declaring such

controls.control_objective: To ensure be served on the persons / entities conveying the decision of the cooperative banks regarding declaration / classification of the account as fraud or
controls.control_description:
2.1.4 A reasoned Order shall be served on the Persons / Entities conveying
the decision of the Cooperative Banks regarding declaration / classification of
the account as fraud or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be served on the persons / entities conveying the decision of the cooperative banks regarding declaration / classification of the account as fraud or

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain relevant facts / circumstances relied upon, the submission made against the scn and the reasons for classification as fraud or otherwise
controls.control_description:
Such Order(s) must contain relevant facts /
circumstances relied upon, the submission made against the SCN and the
reasons for classification as fraud or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain relevant facts / circumstances relied upon, the submission made against the scn and the reasons for classification as fraud or otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by the board at least once in three years, or more frequently, as may be prescribed by the board
controls.control_description:
2.2 The Fraud Risk Management Policy shall be reviewed by the Board at least once
in three years, or more frequently, as may be prescribed by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by the board at least once in three years, or more frequently, as may be prescribed by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a committee of the board to be known as 'special committee of the board for monitoring and follow-up of cases of frauds' (scbmf) with a min
controls.control_description:
2.3.1 Cooperative Banks shall constitute a Committee of the Board to be
known as 'Special Committee of the Board for Monitoring and Follow-up of
cases of Frauds' (SCBMF) with a minimum of three members of the Board,
4 Please refer to the judgement of the Hon'ble Supreme Court dated March 27, 2023 on Civil Appeal No.7300 of 2022 in the matter of State Bank of India & Ors Vs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a committee of the board to be known as 'special committee of the board for monitoring and follow-up of cases of frauds' (scbmf) with a min

controls.control_objective: To ensure 12, 2023 passed by the hon'ble supreme court in misc
controls.control_description: and connected matters, read with the Order dated May 12, 2023 passed by the Hon'ble Supreme Court in Misc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 12, 2023 passed by the hon'ble supreme court in misc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to
controls.control_description: 12000 of 2021 and connected matters shall be referred to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to

controls.control_objective: To ensure take this into consideration before proceeding against such directors under these directions
controls.control_description: 6 As non-whole-time directors (like nominee directors and independent directors) are normally not in charge of, or responsible to the company for the conduct of business of the company, Cooperative Banks may take this into consideration before proceeding against such directors under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take this into consideration before proceeding against such directors under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be headed by one of the directors
controls.control_description:
The Committee
shall be headed by one of the directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be headed by one of the directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option of constituting a committee of the executives (coe) with a minimum of three members, at least one of whom shall be the chief executive
controls.control_description:
UCBs categorised as Tier 1 & 2 for
regulatory purposes8 and StCBs / CCBs having deposits below ₹1000 crore9,
shall have the option of constituting a Committee of the Executives (CoE) with
a minimum of three members, at least one of whom shall be the Chief
Executive Officer for the purpose of performing the roles and responsibilities
of SCBMF as required under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option of constituting a committee of the executives (coe) with a minimum of three members, at least one of whom shall be the chief executive

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee the effectiveness of the fraud risk management in the cooperative bank
controls.control_description:
2.3.2 SCBMF shall oversee the effectiveness of the fraud risk management in
the Cooperative Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to oversee the effectiveness of the fraud risk management in the cooperative bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and monitor the cases of frauds, including root cause analysis, and suggest mitigating measures for strengthening the internal controls, risk m
controls.control_description:
SCBMF shall review and monitor the cases of frauds,
including root cause analysis, and suggest mitigating measures for
strengthening the internal controls, risk management framework and
minimising the incidence of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and monitor the cases of frauds, including root cause analysis, and suggest mitigating measures for strengthening the internal controls, risk m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the board of the cooperative bank
controls.control_description:
The coverage10 and periodicity of such
reviews shall be decided by the Board of the Cooperative Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by the board of the cooperative bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for implementation of the fraud risk management policy approved by the board of the cooperative bank
controls.control_description:
2.4 The Senior Management shall be responsible for implementation of the fraud risk
management policy approved by the Board of the Cooperative Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for implementation of the fraud risk management policy approved by the board of the cooperative bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be placed before board / audit committee of board (acb), as appropriate, by the senior management of the cooperative bank
controls.control_description:
A periodic
review of incidents of fraud shall also be placed before Board / Audit Committee of
Board (ACB), as appropriate, by the Senior Management of the Cooperative Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be placed before board / audit committee of board (acb), as appropriate, by the senior management of the cooperative bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a transparent mechanism to ensure that whistle blower complaints on possible fraud cases / suspicious activities in account(s) are examin
controls.control_description:
2.5 Cooperative Banks shall put in place a transparent mechanism to ensure that
Whistle Blower complaints on possible fraud cases / suspicious activities in
account(s) are examined and concluded appropriately under their Whistle Blower
Policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a transparent mechanism to ensure that whistle blower complaints on possible fraud cases / suspicious activities in account(s) are examin

controls.control_objective: To ensure set-up an appropriate organisational structure for institutionalisation of fraud risk management11 within their overall risk management functions / de
controls.control_description:
2.6 Cooperative Banks shall set-up an appropriate organisational structure for
institutionalisation of fraud risk management11 within their overall risk management
functions / Department.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set-up an appropriate organisational structure for institutionalisation of fraud risk management11 within their overall risk management functions / de

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for monitoring and reporting of frauds
controls.control_description:
A sufficiently senior official shall be responsible for
monitoring and reporting of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for monitoring and reporting of frauds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as per audited balance sheet as on 31st march of the immediate preceding financial year
controls.control_description: 9 The deposits of StCBs and CCBs shall be reckoned as per audited balance sheet as on 31st March of the immediate preceding Financial Year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as per audited balance sheet as on 31st march of the immediate preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, among others, categories/trends of frauds, industry/sectoral/ geographical concentration of frauds, delay in detection/classification of frau
controls.control_description: 10 The coverage may include, among others, categories/trends of frauds, industry/sectoral/ geographical concentration of frauds, delay in detection/classification of frauds and delay in examination/conclusion of staff accountability, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, among others, categories/trends of frauds, industry/sectoral/ geographical concentration of frauds, delay in detection/classification of frau

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a framework for early warning signals (ews) under the overall fraud risk management policy approved by the board
controls.control_description:
Applicable Cooperative Banks for the purpose of this
Chapter) shall have a framework for Early Warning Signals (EWS) under the
overall Fraud Risk Management Policy approved by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a framework for early warning signals (ews) under the overall fraud risk management policy approved by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee the effectiveness of the framework for ews
controls.control_description:
3.1.2 A Board Level Committee13 shall oversee the effectiveness of the
framework for EWS.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to oversee the effectiveness of the framework for ews

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for implementation of a robust framework for ews within the applicable cooperative bank
controls.control_description:
The Senior Management shall be responsible for
implementation of a robust Framework for EWS within the Applicable
Cooperative Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for implementation of a robust framework for ews within the applicable cooperative bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify appropriate early warning indicators for monitoring credit facilities / loan accounts and other banking transactions
controls.control_description:
3.1.3 Applicable Cooperative Banks shall identify appropriate early warning
indicators for monitoring credit facilities / loan accounts and other banking
transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify appropriate early warning indicators for monitoring credit facilities / loan accounts and other banking transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically for their effectiveness
controls.control_description:
These indicators shall be reviewed periodically for their
effectiveness.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed periodically for their effectiveness

controls.control_objective: To ensure alert / trigger deeper investigation from potential fraud angle and initiating preventive measures
controls.control_description:
Suspicion of fraudulent activity thrown up by the presence of
one or more EWS indicators shall alert / trigger deeper investigation from
potential fraud angle and initiating preventive measures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to alert / trigger deeper investigation from potential fraud angle and initiating preventive measures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to suitable validation in accordance with the directions of the board level committee so as to ensure its integrity, robustness and consist
controls.control_description:
3.1.4 The EWS framework shall be subject to suitable validation in
accordance with the directions of the Board Level Committee so as to ensure
its integrity, robustness and consistency of the outcomes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to suitable validation in accordance with the directions of the board level committee so as to ensure its integrity, robustness and consist

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for, among others:
controls.control_description: 3.2 The EWS Framework shall provide for, among others:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for, among others:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be comprehensive and designed to include both the quantitative and qualitative indicators to make the framework robust and effective
controls.control_description:
3.3.1 The EWS system shall be comprehensive and designed to include both
the quantitative and qualitative indicators to make the framework robust and
effective.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be comprehensive and designed to include both the quantitative and qualitative indicators to make the framework robust and effective

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to ucbs categorised as tier 3 & 4 for regulatory purposes and stcbs / ccbs having deposits above ₹1000 crore only
controls.control_description:
The broad indicators which the EWS system may illustratively
12 The Directions under Chapter III shall be applicable to UCBs categorised as Tier 3 & 4 for regulatory purposes and StCBs / CCBs having deposits above ₹1000 crore only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to ucbs categorised as tier 3 & 4 for regulatory purposes and stcbs / ccbs having deposits above ₹1000 crore only

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessitate examination whether the account needs to be investigated from potential fraud angle
controls.control_description:
3.3.2 Generation of EWS alert(s) / trigger(s) shall necessitate examination
whether the account needs to be investigated from potential fraud angle.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessitate examination whether the account needs to be investigated from potential fraud angle

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop / strengthen their ews system by identifying suitable indicators and parameterising them in their ews system for monitoring other banking / no
controls.control_description:
3.4.1 Applicable Cooperative Banks shall develop / strengthen their EWS
system by identifying suitable indicators and parameterising them in their
EWS system for monitoring other banking / non-credit related transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop / strengthen their ews system by identifying suitable indicators and parameterising them in their ews system for monitoring other banking / no

controls.control_objective: To ensure strive to continuously upgrade the ews system for enhancing its integrity and robustness, monitor other banking / non-credit related transactions effi
controls.control_description:
Applicable Cooperative Banks shall strive to continuously upgrade the EWS
system for enhancing its integrity and robustness, monitor other banking /
non-credit related transactions efficiently and prevent fraudulent activities
through the banking channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strive to continuously upgrade the ews system for enhancing its integrity and robustness, monitor other banking / non-credit related transactions effi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be tested periodically
controls.control_description:
Further, the effectiveness of EWS system shall
be tested periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be tested periodically

controls.control_objective: To ensure be robust and resilient to ensure that integrity of system is maintained, personal and financial data of customers are secure and transaction monitori
controls.control_description:
3.4.2 The design and specification of EWS system shall be robust and
resilient to ensure that integrity of system is maintained, personal and
financial data of customers are secure and transaction monitoring for
prevention / detection of potential fraud is on real-time basis15.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be robust and resilient to ensure that integrity of system is maintained, personal and financial data of customers are secure and transaction monitori

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain vigilant in monitoring transactions / unusual activities, specifically in the non-kyc compliant and money mule accounts etc
controls.control_description:
Applicable
Cooperative Banks shall remain vigilant in monitoring transactions / unusual
activities, specifically in the non-KYC compliant and money mule accounts
etc., so as to contain unauthorised / fraudulent transactions and to prevent
misuse of banking / financial channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain vigilant in monitoring transactions / unusual activities, specifically in the non-kyc compliant and money mule accounts etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure extensively monitor and analyse financial transactions, including transactions carried out through digital platforms / applications, in order to ident
controls.control_description:
3.4.3 The dedicated MIS Unit or other Analytics Setup in Applicable
Cooperative Banks shall extensively monitor and analyse financial
transactions, including transactions carried out through digital platforms /
applications, in order to identify unusual patterns and activities which could
alert the Applicable Cooperative Banks in time for initiating appropriate
measures towards prevention of fraudulent activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extensively monitor and analyse financial transactions, including transactions carried out through digital platforms / applications, in order to ident

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place / suitably upgrade their existing ews system within six months from the date of issuance of these directions
controls.control_description:
3.5 Applicable Cooperative Banks shall put in place / suitably upgrade their existing
EWS system within six months from the date of issuance of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place / suitably upgrade their existing ews system within six months from the date of issuance of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor activities in credit facility / loan account / other banking transactions and remain alert on activities which could potentially turn out to b
controls.control_description:
Credit facility / Loan account / Other banking transactions - Indication of fraudulent activities
Cooperative Banks shall monitor activities in credit facility / loan account / other
banking transactions and remain alert on activities which could potentially turn out to
be fraudulent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor activities in credit facility / loan account / other banking transactions and remain alert on activities which could potentially turn out to b

controls.control_objective: To ensure use an external audit16 or an internal audit as per their board approved policy for further investigation in such accounts
controls.control_description:
4.1 In cases where there is a suspicion / indication of wrongdoing or fraudulent
activity, Cooperative Banks shall use an external audit16 or an internal audit as per
their Board Approved Policy for further investigation in such accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to use an external audit16 or an internal audit as per their board approved policy for further investigation in such accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a policy on engagement of external auditors covering aspects such as due diligence, competency and track record of the auditors, among others
controls.control_description:
4.1.1 Cooperative Banks shall frame a policy on engagement of external
auditors covering aspects such as due diligence, competency and track
record of the auditors, among others.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a policy on engagement of external auditors covering aspects such as due diligence, competency and track record of the auditors, among others

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, contain suitable clauses on timeline for completion of the audit and submission of audit report to the cooperative banks within a specif
controls.control_description:
Further, the contractual agreement with
the auditors shall, inter alia, contain suitable clauses on timeline for
completion of the audit and submission of audit report to the Cooperative
Banks within a specified time limit, as approved by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to , inter alia, contain suitable clauses on timeline for completion of the audit and submission of audit report to the cooperative banks within a specif

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain clauses for conduct of such audit at the behest of lender(s)
controls.control_description:
4.1.2 The loan agreement with the borrower shall contain clauses for conduct
of such audit at the behest of lender(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain clauses for conduct of such audit at the behest of lender(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure conclude on status of the account as a fraud or otherwise based on the material available on their record and their own internal investigation / asses
controls.control_description:
In cases where the audit report
submitted remains inconclusive or is delayed due to non-cooperation by the
borrower, Cooperative Banks shall conclude on status of the account as a
fraud or otherwise based on the material available on their record and their
own internal investigation / assessment in such cases17.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conclude on status of the account as a fraud or otherwise based on the material available on their record and their own internal investigation / asses

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the principles of natural justice18 are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud
controls.control_description:
4.1.3 Cooperative Banks (sole lending, multiple banking arrangement or
consortium lending) shall ensure that the principles of natural justice18 are
strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the principles of natural justice18 are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that principles of natural justice are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud (please refer to para 2
controls.control_description: 17 Cooperative Banks shall ensure that principles of natural justice are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud (Please refer to Para 2.1 ibid).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that principles of natural justice are strictly adhered to before classifying / declaring an account as fraud (please refer to para 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to (please refer to para 2
controls.control_description: 12000 of 2021 and connected matters shall be referred to (Please refer to Para 2.1 ibid).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to (please refer to para 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subjected to examination by cooperative banks concerned from fraud angle under these directions
controls.control_description:
4.1.4 In case an account is identified as a fraud by any Cooperative Bank, the
borrowal accounts of other group companies, in which one or more
promoter(s) / whole-time director(s) are common shall also be subjected to
examination by Cooperative Banks concerned from fraud angle under these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subjected to examination by cooperative banks concerned from fraud angle under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the process of classification of account as fraud as per their board approved policy and in tune with the process as given under para 2
controls.control_description:
4.1.5 In cases where Law Enforcement Agencies (LEAs) have suo moto
initiated investigation involving a borrower account, Cooperative Banks shall
follow the process of classification of account as fraud as per their Board
approved Policy and in tune with the process as given under Para 2.1 ibid.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the process of classification of account as fraud as per their board approved policy and in tune with the process as given under para 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate necessary terms and conditions in their agreements with third-party service providers to hold them accountable in situations where wilful
controls.control_description:
Therefore, Cooperative Banks
may incorporate necessary terms and conditions in their agreements with third-party
service providers to hold them accountable in situations where wilful negligence /
malpractice by them is found to be a causative factor for fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate necessary terms and conditions in their agreements with third-party service providers to hold them accountable in situations where wilful

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate and complete the examination of staff accountability in all fraud cases in a time-bound manner in accordance with their internal policy
controls.control_description:
4.3.1 Cooperative Banks shall initiate and complete the examination of staff
accountability in all fraud cases in a time-bound manner in accordance with
their internal policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to initiate and complete the examination of staff accountability in all fraud cases in a time-bound manner in accordance with their internal policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate examination of their accountability and place before the board
controls.control_description:
4.3.2 In cases involving very senior executives of the Cooperative Banks (MD
& CEO / Chief Executive Officer / Executives of equivalent rank)19, the ACB
shall initiate examination of their accountability and place before the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate examination of their accountability and place before the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate in the meeting of the board / acb / scbmf in which their accountability is to be considered
controls.control_description:
4.4.1 Persons / Entities classified and reported as fraud by Cooperative Banks
and also Entities and Persons associated20 with such Entities, shall be
19 Such executive shall not participate in the meeting of the Board / ACB / SCBMF in which their accountability is to be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to participate in the meeting of the board / acb / scbmf in which their accountability is to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be associated
controls.control_description: (b) in case of a natural person, all entities in which she / he is associated as promoter, or director, or as one in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity shall be deemed to be associated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be associated

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the sole discretion to entertain or decline such requests for credit facilities after the expiry of the mandatory cooling period as mentioned at
controls.control_description:
4.4.2 Lending to such Persons / Entities, being commercial decisions, the
lending Cooperative Banks shall have the sole discretion to entertain or
decline such requests for credit facilities after the expiry of the mandatory
cooling period as mentioned at Para 4.4.1 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the sole discretion to entertain or decline such requests for credit facilities after the expiry of the mandatory cooling period as mentioned at

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine whether the entity shall continue to remain classified as fraud or the classification as fraud could be removed after implementation of the re
controls.control_description:
4.5.1 In case an entity classified as fraud has subsequently undergone a
resolution either under IBC or under the resolution framework of RBI21
resulting in a change in the management and control of the entity / business
enterprise, the Cooperative Bank shall examine whether the entity shall
continue to remain classified as fraud or the classification as fraud could be
removed after implementation of the Resolution Plan under IBC or aforesaid
prudential framework.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine whether the entity shall continue to remain classified as fraud or the classification as fraud could be removed after implementation of the re

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc or aforesaid prudential framework
controls.control_description:
4.5.2 The penal measures as detailed in Para 4.4 shall not be applicable to
entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan
under IBC or aforesaid prudential framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be applicable to entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan under ibc or aforesaid prudential framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to apply to the erstwhile promoter(s)/ director(s)/ persons who were in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the entit
controls.control_description:
4.5.3 The penal measures detailed in Para 4.4 shall continue to apply to the
erstwhile promoter(s)/ director(s)/ persons who were in charge and
responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity / business
enterprise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to apply to the erstwhile promoter(s)/ director(s)/ persons who were in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs of the entit

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately report the incidents of fraud to appropriate leas viz
controls.control_description:
5.1 Cooperative Banks shall immediately report the incidents of fraud to appropriate
LEAs viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately report the incidents of fraud to appropriate leas viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish suitable nodal point(s) / designate officer(s) for reporting incidents of fraud to leas and for proper coordination to meet the requirements
controls.control_description:
5.2 Cooperative Banks shall establish suitable nodal point(s) / designate officer(s) for
reporting incidents of fraud to LEAs and for proper coordination to meet the
requirements of the LEAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish suitable nodal point(s) / designate officer(s) for reporting incidents of fraud to leas and for proper coordination to meet the requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure choose the most appropriate category from any one of the following:
controls.control_description:
6.1 Reporting of Incidents of Fraud to Reserve Bank of India (RBI)
To ensure uniformity and consistency while reporting incidents of fraud to RBI
through Fraud Monitoring Returns (FMRs) using online portal, UCBs shall choose
the most appropriate category from any one of the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to choose the most appropriate category from any one of the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure report incidents of fraud to nabard in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nabard
controls.control_description: They shall report incidents of fraud to NABARD in the manner and in Returns / Formats as prescribed by NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report incidents of fraud to nabard in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish fmr23 in individual fraud cases, irrespective of the amount involved, immediately but not later than 14 days from the date of classification24
controls.control_description:
6.2.1 UCBs shall furnish FMR23 in individual fraud cases, irrespective of the
amount involved, immediately but not later than 14 days from the date of
classification24 of an incident / account as fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish fmr23 in individual fraud cases, irrespective of the amount involved, immediately but not later than 14 days from the date of classification24

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the timeframe prescribed in these master directions for reporting of fraud cases to rbi25
controls.control_description:
6.2.2 UCBs shall adhere to the timeframe prescribed in these Master
Directions for reporting of fraud cases to RBI25.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the timeframe prescribed in these master directions for reporting of fraud cases to rbi25

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine and fix staff accountability for delays in identification of fraud cases and in reporting to rbi
controls.control_description:
UCBs must examine and fix
staff accountability for delays in identification of fraud cases and in reporting
to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine and fix staff accountability for delays in identification of fraud cases and in reporting to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that persons / entities who / which are not involved / associated with the fraud are not reported in the fmr
controls.control_description:
6.2.3 While reporting frauds, UCBs shall ensure that persons / entities who /
which are not involved / associated with the fraud are not reported in the
FMR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that persons / entities who / which are not involved / associated with the fraud are not reported in the fmr

controls.control_objective: To ensure , under exceptional circumstances, withdraw fmr / remove name(s) of perpetrator(s) from fmr
controls.control_description:
6.2.4 UCBs may, under exceptional circumstances, withdraw FMR / remove
name(s) of perpetrator(s) from FMR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , under exceptional circumstances, withdraw fmr / remove name(s) of perpetrator(s) from fmr

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, be made with due justification and with the approval of an official at least in the rank of a director
controls.control_description:
Such withdrawal / removal shall,
however, be made with due justification and with the approval of an official at
least in the rank of a director.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, be made with due justification and with the approval of an official at least in the rank of a director

controls.control_objective: To ensure close fraud cases using 'closure module' where the actions as stated below are complete:
controls.control_description:
6.3.1 UCBs shall close fraud cases using 'Closure Module' where the actions
as stated below are complete:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to close fraud cases using 'closure module' where the actions as stated below are complete:

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain details of such cases for examination by auditors
controls.control_description:
6.3.2 In all closure cases of reported frauds, UCBs shall maintain details of
such cases for examination by auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain details of such cases for examination by auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be done by the paying banker and not by the 23 updates to the fmr shall be provided through fmr update application (fua)
controls.control_description:
7.1 To ensure uniformity and avoid duplication, reporting of frauds involving forged
instruments, including fake / forged instruments sent in clearing in respect of
truncated instruments, shall continue to be done by the paying banker and not by the
23 Updates to the FMR shall be provided through FMR Update Application (FUA).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be done by the paying banker and not by the 23 updates to the fmr shall be provided through fmr update application (fua)

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately handover the underlying instrument to the drawee / paying cooperative bank, as and when demanded, to enable them to inform leas for invest
controls.control_description:
In such cases the presenting Cooperative Bank shall immediately
handover the underlying instrument to the drawee / paying Cooperative Bank, as and
when demanded, to enable them to inform LEAs for investigation and further action
under law and to report the fraud to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately handover the underlying instrument to the drawee / paying cooperative bank, as and when demanded, to enable them to inform leas for invest

controls.control_objective: To ensure file the fraud report with the rbi and inform the leas for investigation and further action under law
controls.control_description:
or where the
amount has been credited before realisation and subsequently the instrument is
found to be fake / forged and returned by the paying Cooperative Bank, the
presenting Cooperative Bank which is defrauded or is put to loss by paying the
amount before realisation of the instrument shall file the fraud report with the RBI
and inform the LEAs for investigation and further action under law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to file the fraud report with the rbi and inform the leas for investigation and further action under law

controls.control_objective: To ensure subject the title deeds and other related title documents in respect of all credit facilities of ₹1 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re- ve
controls.control_description:
8.1 Legal Audit of Title Documents in respect of Large Value Loan Accounts
Cooperative Banks shall subject the title deeds and other related title documents in
respect of all credit facilities of ₹1 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re-
verification, till the loan is fully repaid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to subject the title deeds and other related title documents in respect of all credit facilities of ₹1 crore and above to periodic legal audit and re- ve

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the board approved policy referred to in clause 2
controls.control_description:
The scope and periodicity of legal audit shall
be in accordance with the Board approved policy referred to in clause 2.1 above.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be in accordance with the board approved policy referred to in clause 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure complete the investigation from fraud angle before transferring the loan account / credit facility to other lenders / arcs
controls.control_description:
8.2 Treatment of Accounts classified as Fraud and sold to other Lenders / Asset Reconstruction Companies (ARCs)27
Cooperative Banks shall complete the investigation from fraud angle before
transferring the loan account / credit facility to other lenders / ARCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to complete the investigation from fraud angle before transferring the loan account / credit facility to other lenders / arcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure report it to rbi / nabard28 before selling the asset to other lenders / arcs29
controls.control_description:
In cases where
Cooperative Banks conclude that a fraud has been perpetrated in the account, they
shall report it to RBI / NABARD28 before selling the asset to other lenders / ARCs29.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report it to rbi / nabard28 before selling the asset to other lenders / arcs29

controls.control_objective: To ensure come across instances where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of fraudulent transactions in the account
controls.control_description:
8.3.1 During the course of the audit, auditors may come across instances
where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility
of fraudulent transactions in the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come across instances where the transactions in the account or the documents point to the possibility of fraudulent transactions in the account

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to nabard
controls.control_description: 28 StCBs / CCBs shall report to NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to report subsequent developments in such accounts to rbi / nabard, by obtaining requisite information periodically from the concerned arcs
controls.control_description: 29 In cases where accounts are sold to ARCs, Cooperative Banks shall continue to report subsequent developments in such accounts to RBI / NABARD, by obtaining requisite information periodically from the concerned ARCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to continue to report subsequent developments in such accounts to rbi / nabard, by obtaining requisite information periodically from the concerned arcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately bring it to the notice of the senior management and if necessary, to the audit committee of the board (acb) of the cooperative banks for a
controls.control_description:
should immediately bring it to the notice of the senior management and if
necessary, to the Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) of the Cooperative
Banks for appropriate action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately bring it to the notice of the senior management and if necessary, to the audit committee of the board (acb) of the cooperative banks for a

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover controls and processes involved in prevention, detection, classification, monitoring, reporting, closure and withdrawal of fraud cases, and also
controls.control_description:
8.3.2 Internal Audit in Cooperative Banks shall cover controls and processes
involved in prevention, detection, classification, monitoring, reporting, closure
and withdrawal of fraud cases, and also weaknesses observed in the critical
processes in the fraud risk management framework of the Cooperative
Bank30.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover controls and processes involved in prevention, detection, classification, monitoring, reporting, closure and withdrawal of fraud cases, and also

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, and not the date of approval by the competent authority of the cooperative bank
controls.control_description:
8.4.2 The 'date of detection' to be reported in FMR is the actual date when the
fraud came to light in the concerned branch / audit / department, as the case
may be, and not the date of approval by the competent authority of the
Cooperative Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, and not the date of approval by the competent authority of the cooperative bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure report32 instances of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery (including attempted cases), to fraud monitoring group (fmg), department of supervision, ce
controls.control_description:
9.1 Cooperative Banks shall report32 instances of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery
(including attempted cases), to Fraud Monitoring Group (FMG), Department of
Supervision, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India, immediately (not later than seven
days) from their occurrence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to report32 instances of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery (including attempted cases), to fraud monitoring group (fmg), department of supervision, ce

controls.control_objective: To ensure report incidents of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to nabard in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nabard
controls.control_description: They shall report incidents of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to NABARD in the manner and in Returns / Formats as prescribed by NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report incidents of theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to nabard in the manner and in returns / formats as prescribed by nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure also submit a quarterly return (rbr) on theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to rbi using online portal, covering all such cases during the quarter
controls.control_description:
9.2 Cooperative Banks shall also submit a quarterly Return (RBR) on theft, burglary,
dacoity and robbery to RBI using online portal, covering all such cases during the
quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also submit a quarterly return (rbr) on theft, burglary, dacoity and robbery to rbi using online portal, covering all such cases during the quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted within 15 days from the end of the quarter to which it relates
controls.control_description:
This shall be submitted within 15 days from the end of the quarter to which it
relates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted within 15 days from the end of the quarter to which it relates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as given under these directions
controls.control_description:
All the
instructions / guidelines contained in these Circulars shall be deemed as given under
these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as given under these directions
